use_cases: Selecting numeric values within a range in forms or settings
Filtering products by price range in e-commerce interfaces
Adjusting volume, brightness, or other continuous settings
Displaying progress or completion indicators in dashboards
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible range slider component built on Radix UI primitives with minimalist styling. Features a rounded track with a filled range indicator and a draggable thumb with focus states. Supports touch, keyboard navigation, and disabled states. Designed for seamless integration into forms, settings panels, or any interface requiring range value selection.
